headline: Saudi Arabia In-Vitro Diagnostics (IVD) Market Report 2025-2034 Featuring Roche, Danaher, Abbott Laboratories, Thermo Fischer Scientific, Bio-Rad Laboratories, Sysmex, BD & Co, and Biomerieux
summary: The Saudi Arabia in vitro diagnostics (IVD) market is set for steady growth, driven by the increasing prevalence of chronic and infectious diseases and enhanced healthcare spending. Estimated to rise from US$ 820.36 million in 2025 to US$ 1.17 billion by 2034, the market is supported by technological advancements, governmental investments under Vision 2030, and a strong focus on early disease detection.
